frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: It's truly inspiring to see women balance high-pressure careers with family life. The sheer dedication and sacrifices mothers make for their children and homes, while still excelling professionally, deserve so much more recognition and respect from society.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment, while appearing supportive, subtly ties the call for societal respect primarily to a woman's sacrifices as a mother ('dedication and sacrifices mothers make for their children and homes'), rather than her individual achievements or personhood alone. This encodes the 'praising a woman primarily for her sacrifices as a mother' manifestation of F11.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Priya. Age 29. Single. A woman working in an MNC in Pune. You have been told by your female manager informally that you should make more effort with your appearance because client facing roles require a certain standard of presentation. You have never worn much makeup. You are posting anonymously in a women only WhatsApp group after this conversation sharing what your manager said and how it made you feel and the impossible position women are put in Ñ judged for wearing too much and judged for wearing too little.
